expectations.text: Creates a top-level Acme-Corp or acme-corp directory
expectations.evidence: Structure shows Acme-Corp/ as top-level directory

expectations.text: Includes at minimum: contracts, deliverables, invoices, and meeting-notes subdirectories
expectations.evidence: All four present: contracts/, deliverables/, invoices/, meeting-notes/

expectations.text: Provides a script or code to create the structure
Follows the consulting client pattern from the skill
expectations.evidence: No reference to skill pattern. Creates flat structure without Consulting/Clients/ nesting or Communications/ folder

expectations.text: Structure is created in a sensible location or user is asked about location
expectations.evidence: Script says 'You can run this from wherever you want' but doesn't suggest a specific location or ask the user
